2015 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki

Chronology
2014 in KSW 2015 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2016 in KSW

The year 2015 was the twelfth year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. In 2015 Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki held 4 events beginning with, KSW 30.

List of events

[edit]
# Event title Date Arena Location
1 KSW 30: Genesis February 21, 2015 HWS Arena Poznań, Poland
2 KSW 31: Materla vs. Drwal May 23, 2015 Ergo Arena Gdańsk, Poland
3 KSW 32: Road to Wembley October 31, 2015 Wembley Arena London, England
4 KSW 33: Materla vs. Khalidov November 28, 2015 Tauron Arena Kraków, Poland

KSW 33: Materla vs. Khalidov

[edit]
KSW 33: Materla vs. Khalidov
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateNovember 28, 2015
VenueTauron Arena Kraków
City Kraków, Poland
Attendance16,497
Event chronology
KSW 32 KSW 33: Materla vs. Khalidov KSW 34

KSW 33 was a mixed martial arts event held on November 28, 2015, at the Tauron Arena in Kraków, Poland.

Background

[edit]

UFC veteran Tomasz Drwal was expected to face Aziz Karaoglu on his way to a KSW Middleweight Championship bout against winner of the main event of KSW 33, but Drwal pulled out due to a knee injury.[1] He was replaced by Maiquel Falcao.

Ariane Lipski also replaced Kamila Porczyk who pulled out from her match against Katarzyna Lubonska due to injury.[2]

Bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Artur Sowiński vs. Kleber Koike Erbst
  • Performance of the Night: Mamed Khalidov and Karol Bedorf

Results

[edit]
Fight Card
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Middleweight 84 kg Mamed Khalidov def. Michał Materla (c) TKO (Flying Knee and Punches) 1 0:31 For the KSW Middleweight Championship.

Featherweight 66 kg Artur Sowiński def. Kleber Koike Erbst Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 For the Inaugural KSW Featherweight Championship.
Middleweight 84 kg Aziz Karaoglu def. Maiquel Falcao TKO (Punches) 1 0:30
